Cargo.lock gitignored for binary = builds against latest compatible semver = API breakage risk. mcporter.json needs mcpServers key, not servers." 2>&1 && \
bd update syslog-mcp-71z.2 --status closed 2>&1

bash ((N++)) returns exit code 1 when N==0 (arithmetic result 0 = falsy), causing set -e to abort. Use (( N++ )) || true. DEVIATION: Fixed SQL bug in db.rs — correlate_events used l.timestamp in non-FTS query path which had no table alias (FROM logs not FROM logs l). Fixed by adding l alias to non-FTS SELECT." 2>&1 && \
bd update syslog-mcp-71z.3 --status closed 2>&1 && \
bd update syslog-mcp-71z --status closed 2>&1
